title: lilium tsingtauense var. carneum
intro: Lilium tsingtauense var. carneum is a rare and unique variety of the Chinese lily, scientifically known as a type of flowering plant belonging to the lily family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Lilium tsingtauense var. carneum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
